description: All source files used to generate the Solar Return PDF report

files.src/components/SolarReturnPDFExport.tsx: See the full file in the project - 1360 lines, too large to inline in JSON. This is the main React component that orchestrates cover, TOC, all sections, and the download button.
files.src/lib/pdfSections/cover.ts: Cover page rendering - cake image, name, year, comparison table
files.src/lib/pdfSections/pdfContext.ts: Shared layout engine - colors, card drawing, page breaks, text helpers
files.src/lib/pdfSections/tableOfContents.ts: Table of contents with clickable links
files.src/lib/pdfSections/howToRead.ts: How to Read This Report section
files.src/lib/pdfSections/strengthsPortrait.ts: Your Big Three - Sun, Moon, Rising analysis
files.src/lib/pdfSections/keyDates.ts: Key Dates - Time Lord transit calculations

note: This JSON is a manifest. To get the actual file contents, use the Code Editor in Lovable (code icon in the navigation bar) and navigate to each file path listed above.
